comment: Append-only manifest of released lazyweb-skill commits. Maps the SHA an installed client reports (git rev-parse HEAD after lazyweb-update hard-resets to origin/main) to the released version. The server fetches this raw from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aboul3ata/lazyweb-skill/main/releases.json and builds an O(1) sha->{version,expected_set} map (cached/last-good like the existing VERSION probe). A known SHA is VERIFIED; unknown/missing is UNTRUSTED. `expected_set` = sha256 over the sorted, unique canonical lazyweb-* skill basenames shipped in skills/ at that commit (same computation as setup's installed_skill_set_hash); used as a telemetry-only branch-trap detector in Phase 0. New entries are appended by the release CI on push to main that changes VERSION (.github/workflows/release-manifest.yml). The current main HEAD entry is first; it is the load-bearing SHA currently-installed clients present.
